appshots.reason: Prior GNOME/Wayland screenshot capture failed; current Linux UI did not expose a successful Appshots workflow. Official docs are macOS-oriented.

artifact_preview.reason: No safe generated artifact workflow was completed after project picker/settings issues; add-files menu present but native picker not exercised.
